keyMappings:
" map <space> <command>
mapkey <c-m> <c-[>
unmap t
unmap i
unmap ` 
map tt createTab
map tw moveTabToNewWindow
map I enterInsertMode
map cc visitPreviousTab
map h previousTab
map l nextTab
map u moveTabLeft
map d moveTabRight
map U moveTabLeft count=99
map D moveTabRight count=99
map s scrollLeft
map S scrollRight
map qh closeTabsOnLeft
map ql closeTabsOnRight
map H goBack
map L goForward
map J scrollPageDown
map K scrollPageUp
map ga firstTab
map gh firstTab
map gl lastTab
unmap m
map ma Marks.activateCreateMode swap
map ' Marks.activateGotoMode swap
map p Marks.activateCreateMode
map P Marks.activateGotoMode
map F LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue
map R reload hard
map W Vomnibar.activate keyword=w
map w Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=w
map gO Vomnibar.activate keyword=go
map go Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=go
map yO Vomnibar.activate keyword=yo
map yo Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=yo
map aZ Vomnibar.activate keyword=az
map az Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=az
map gM Vomnibar.activate keyword=gm
map gm Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=gm
map M toggleMuteTab
map \ passNextKey normal
map <c-l> <anyOldJunk>
map <c-/> createTab chrome-extension://dbepggeogbaibhgnhhndojpepiihcmeb/pages/options.html
searchEngines:
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
# More examples.
#
# (Vimium supports search completion Wikipedia, as
# above, and for these.)
#
go: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
yo: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google maps
az: https://www.amazon.com/s/?field-keywords=%s Amazon
# l: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s&btnI I'm feeling lucky...
# b: https://www.bing.com/search?q=%s Bing
# d: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%s DuckDuckGo
# qw: https://www.qwant.com/?q=%s Qwant
